title: onosma caucasica subsp. caucasica
intro: Onosma caucasica subsp. caucasica, also known as Caucasian onosma or mountain globe thistle, is a plant species within the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Onosma caucasica subsp. caucasica include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as wounds and ulcers, due to its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Onosma caucasica subsp. caucasica are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and can also be applied topically as a cream or ointment to aid in wound healing and skin health.
